productDisplayName: Fila Men Drop Needle Black Slippers
description: fila specialises in high-quality footwear. This pair of flip flops from fila showcases the brand's versatility. The striping on the footbed pays tribute to the retro chic of the '80s. Pair these with denims rolled at the cuffs and a casual shirt or a polo collar tee. Upper Thong strap construction in padded synthetic leather Padded straps for a snug Fit Synthetic leather toe separator for comfort Embroidered branding on the strap and footbed Outsole Soft, cushioned footbed in synthetic leather Grooved TPU outsole for great grip Terraced flex grooves for flexibility Noodle-patterned grooves for enhanced grip and comfort shoe care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
